title: StartInv
description: You will start with a few seconds of immortality! You will never start dying again
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Start_Inv/BH_SI_Header.webp) The objective of this mod is to allow players to have a few seconds of immortality (customizable, though 15 seconds by default), when entering a world. This is due to the fact that while the loading screen process lasts, there are often situations that are not appropriate, and sometimes end in deaths, or loss of time that we should not have. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Start_Inv/BH_SI_Summary.webp) For example, it is an ideal mod for those game starts in which players start on top of a tree, and they must quickly descend without getting hurt, or on the contrary, also appear in the depths of an ocean. Besides, it also works for games already started, or every time you join a world already started, so don't worry, no mob will kill you while you are joining and you only see the damn loading screen... ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Start_Inv/BH_SI_FAQ.webp) ### How long does the effect last? When does it affect? ### By default, the immortality effect lasts 15 seconds, but this is somewhat modifiable. Players will only be immortal when starting a world for the first time, so it will not be every time the game starts. ### Is it compatible with other mods? ### We have carried out numerous tests, and we have not found any type of incompatibility, neither with other mods, nor of course, in multiplayer games. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
